zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts於1412年出生在英國英格蘭肯特格拉瑟波瑞時，她的父親William Baker22歲，母親Mrs Joan Baker22歲。她於1430年與John Roberts在英國英格蘭肯特格拉瑟波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1494年2月15日在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts于1412年出生在英国英格兰肯特格拉瑟波瑞时，她的父亲William Baker22岁，母亲Mrs Joan Baker22岁。她于1430年与John Roberts在英国英格兰肯特格拉瑟波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1494年2月15日在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 比可哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Buckford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place now in Worcestershire (formerly in Gloucestershire) named Beckford, from the Middle English name Becke (see Beck 3) + Old English ford ‘ford’. This surname is most frequent in Jamaica.
History: The surname Beckford was taken to Jamaica in the 17th century. Colonel Peter Beckford (1643–1710) served as acting governor of Jamaica in 1702.

variants.name: Beck
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from northern Middle English bekke ‘stream’ (Old Norse bekkr).

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in northern France named Bec, for example Bec Hellouin in Eure, named with Old Norman French bec ‘stream’, from the same Old Norse root as in 1 above.
English: from the Middle English personal name Becke (Old English Becca or Beocca), of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts was born in 1412, in Glassenbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Baker, was 22 and her mother, Mrs Joan Baker, was 22. She married John Roberts in 1430, in Glassenbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 15 February 1494, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in West Peckham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts est née en 1412, à Glassenbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Baker, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs Joan Baker, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Roberts en 1430, à Glassenbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 février 1494, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à West Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Robertsが1412年にイギリスイギリスケントグラセンブリーで生まれた時，父William Bakerは22歳，母Mrs Joan Bakerは22歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリスケントグラセンブリーでJohn Robertsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1494年2月15日にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントウエスト ペックハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 글래센버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Baker(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Joan Baker(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 글래센버이에서 John Roberts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1494년 2월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 펙함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Buckford Baroness Roberts родилась в 1412 г. в местности глассенбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Baker было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Joan Baker, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Roberts в 1430 г. в местности глассенбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 15 февраля 1494 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности вест пеккхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
